headlines.title: A cancer vaccine made just for you. mRNA is back and it's fighting melanoma
headlines.summary: A study finds that an mRNA vaccine is highly effective at preventing recurrence of this dangerous skin cancer, when used in combination with Keytruda, an immunotherapy drug....
